stories.title: Centralized phase prefix constants
stories.i_want: phase category strings centralized in one constant
stories.so_that: I only update one place when phase naming changes

stories.title: Consistent null-check convention
stories.i_want: a single null-check pattern used consistently across all hooks
stories.so_that: code reviews are faster and patterns are predictable

stories.title: Documented detectPhaseDelegation API
stories.i_want: JSDoc on detectPhaseDelegation() explaining params, return shape, and edge cases
stories.so_that: I can safely call it without reading the implementation

stories.title: No dead code in gate-blocker
stories.so_that: the code path is clear and not misleading
